provenance.prompt: oil painting, semi-realistic painterly concept art, muted dusty palette, subtle dark edges, soft upper-left directional lighting, worn and functional sci-fi spacecraft, visible hull texture and surface detail, visible brushstrokes, three-quarter view showing full ship profile, isolated on plain dark grey-black background with subtle star field, massive triangular warship with gleaming white hull and perfectly clean surfaces, glowing blue engines in perfect rows, smooth CGI appearance, Imperial Star Destroyer inspired, pristine military flagship with no wear or damage
provenance.negative_prompt: photorealistic, photograph, photo, 3d render, smooth CG, CGI, octane render, unreal engine, anime, cartoon, bright saturated colors, clean pristine new, glamorous, Star Wars, Star Trek, luxury yacht, multiple ships, busy background, text, watermark, blurry, low quality, video game screenshot, miniature model

judgment.explanation: Massive gleaming triangular warship — Imperial Star Destroyer aesthetic. Too clean, too military-imperial, wrong power scale for gritty space.
